fields.label: Level

log.why: Spell level is a universal spell identity field.

fields.comment: Spell level is a universal spell identity field. It maps to `level`. Purpose: Level exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about this mechanic. Populate it from the canonical markdown prose, including mechanics hidden in descriptive sentences. It maps to runtime JSON path `level`. The value type is `integer`. This is expected on every spell/template instance. Because this field is required, every spell should carry a deliberate value rather than relying on absence.

fields.label: Sub-Classes

log.why: Subclass/domain access is a separate access surface from base classes.
Subclasses are conditional access rows; many spells have no subclass-specific access and should not need placeholder rows.

fields.comment: Subclasses are conditional access rows; many spells have no subclass-specific access and should not need placeholder rows. It maps to `subClasses[]`. Purpose: Sub-Classes exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about this mechanic. Populate it from the canonical markdown prose, including mechanics hidden in descriptive sentences. It maps to runtime JSON path `subClasses[]`. The value type is `csv-string-or-none`. This is optional or conditional in the runtime shape. Omit or leave empty only when this runtime/template layer intentionally treats the field as optional.

fields.label: Access Grants

log.why: Mending showed that feature-granted access, such as Artificer Tinker's Magic, must not pollute base spell-list classes.

fields.comment: Mending showed that feature-granted access, such as Artificer Tinker's Magic, must not pollute base spell-list classes. It maps to `accessGrants[]`. Purpose: Access Grants exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about this mechanic. Populate it from the canonical markdown prose, including mechanics hidden in descriptive sentences. It maps to runtime JSON path `accessGrants[]`. The value type is `summary`. This is optional or conditional in the runtime shape. Omit or leave empty only when this runtime/template layer intentionally treats the field as optional.
